place: Laem Sor, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: West-Facing Beachfront Villa in Laem Sor
blurb: A six-bedroom beachfront retreat on Laem Sor's west-facing shore, built for family groups — a 21-metre lap pool with a swim-up bar, a dedicated kids' bunk room sleeping six, gym, sauna, cinema and a private stretch of sand facing Koh Tan.
detail:
Set on a secluded stretch of Laem Sor Beach on Koh Samui's south-west coast, this beachfront villa is built to catch the sunset — every one of its six en-suite double bedrooms faces the sea, and the whole property is arranged around uninterrupted west-facing views over the water toward Koh Tan. A koi pond and waterfall greet arrivals at the carport before a grand wooden entrance opens straight onto the ocean.

The layout is designed for families and groups travelling together: a wellness zone with a glass-walled gym facing the water, a sauna, a massage sala, and a trampoline in a dedicated kids' garden sit alongside an indoor cinema with a large screen and both Netflix and IPTV. A separate bunk room sleeps six children (or nannies) with its own bathroom, wardrobes and a wall-mounted TV, giving parents and kids their own space.

Outdoors, a 21-metre lap pool runs the length of the villa into a swim-up bar with a BBQ and beachfront seating, joined by a shaded dining pavilion, sunken loungers, and a sala at the pool's beach end. Steps lead down past a lawn to 25 metres of private beachfront. Six bedrooms include two masters with open-air star-gazing bathtubs, all with king beds, black-out curtains and private balconies or terraces; an indoor dining table seats 14, backed by a full guest kitchen and a separate chef's kitchen. A beachfront lounge with a 75-inch TV, a pool table, and a four-zone Sonos sound system rounds out the social spaces.

The villa is fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, and a live-in couple, with CCTV, in-room safes and Wi-Fi throughout — a private, self-contained beachfront compound for large family gatherings.

features.l: 21 m lap pool with swim-up bar
25 m private beachfront on Koh Tan strait
